case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. D'OVEION I. FOOTE ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66342602) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FOOTE, D'OVEION I. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal; And To Enter Judgment (Ccp 664.6); Declaration In Support And Order Setting Aside Dismissal; And Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal; And To Enter Judgment (CCP 664.6).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside dismissal and to enter judgment (CCP 664.6)" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
